scenarios.name: New visitor sees the site map on homepage
scenarios.description: A first-time visitor lands on the homepage and sees the 'The Garden So Far' section with visual nodes.
scenarios.details: Site map section rendered with 3 nodes. Canvas layout initialized within 200ms.

scenarios.name: New visitor clicks a site map node
scenarios.description: Clicking a node in the site map navigates to the corresponding daily entry page.
scenarios.details: Clicked node for 2026-04-03, successfully navigated to /days/?date=2026-04-03.

scenarios.name: Returning visitor finds site map on mobile
scenarios.description: On a mobile viewport, the site map displays as a CSS grid instead of canvas.
scenarios.details: Grid layout with 3 entries rendered at 375px viewport width.

scenarios.name: Site map handles empty manifest
scenarios.description: When no shipped entries exist, the site map shows a friendly empty state.
scenarios.details: Empty state message 'The garden is just getting started.' displayed correctly.

scenarios.name: Returning visitor sees updated site map after new day ships
scenarios.description: After a new day's entry is published, the site map includes the new node on next page load.
scenarios.details: Manifest re-fetched on page load, new entry node appeared in the layout.

scenarios.name: Daily entry page still renders correctly
scenarios.description: The daily entry page for 2026-04-04 renders all sections without errors.
scenarios.details: All 8 sections rendered: candidates, scores, winner, feedback, build summary, review, tests, artifacts.
